note: Character/Property/Sound/Background no longer generate anything via Flow — testing showed Gemini can't reliably infer visual specifics for ambiguous characters (a story just saying 'grandma' or 'a kid'), and designers prefer uploading their own known-good reference images anyway. These four item types are now upload-only: a name (typed manually or created by Story's sync) plus a direct file upload, nothing else. content/outputInstructions intentionally removed.
